creator: saper@system.pl
text:
I have analysed this and I think I know what happens.

Before I will prepare a real fix the workaround is to ask OpenOffice to
use system libz.so.

I think adding "--with-system-zlib" in the Makefile CONFIGURE_ARGS will do.

Unfortunately, one has to fully recompile the OpenOffice after changing
this.

This bug has been reported upstream already:

http://www.openoffice.org/issues/show_bug.cgi?id=85124

Can anybody test whether using system zlib fixes this problem?

-- 
              << Marcin Cieslak // saper@system.pl >>
